item.title: Version 0.0.23
item.description: - Updated defaults: first click now defaults to `Activate App`, while active-app click stays `App Exposé` with `>1 window only` OFF by default. - Simplified the action table UI by moving App Exposé gating into picker options (`App Exposé` / `App Exposé (>1 window only)`) for all slots and returning the table to single-row cells. - Improved scroll direction handling to follow effective per-device event direction (including remappers like LinearMouse) instead of global-only natural-scroll preference. - Added a GitHub mark button next to `About` in settings and refreshed README default-behavior documentation. - Standardized Hide toggles so re-running `Hide App` or `Hide Others` now undoes hidden state via `Show All`.
